posts.author: jstanko1982 (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would love to see an option to preview an email notification that goes out with automations to confirm all the chosen fields within the email are used correctly and the email goes out as needed or planned. Mine tend to be fairly complex based on how I use it, and the option to see a preview rather than waiting for a “test” to come through would be wildly beneficial

Thank you!
